_meta.description: Registry for #268 (demos/ consolidation). Categorizes every top-level demos/*.html file so the coverage gate (tests/compliance/demos-registry-coverage.spec.ts) can flag orphans/new duplicates. Scope is demos/*.html top-level only — demos/site/*.html is the generated consolidated catalog (scripts/generate-site.mjs + src/wb-models/pages/wb-component-library.site.json) and isn't tracked here. See docs/_today/demos-redo-plan-268.md for the full history.

canonical.description: One canonical demo per topic. Every wb-* component and x-* behavior — including the former semantic-category pages (semantics-forms/media/structure/theme.html) and sticky-demo.html, all merged into demos/site/*.html as manualSections per direct instruction ('no more single links to a single demo') — now lives in demos/site/*.html. No standalone single-topic demo pages remain; see plan doc for full history.

duplicates_to_retire.description: Confirmed overlapping with a demos/site/*.html canonical page — retire once the migration PR lands. NOT deleted yet (plan phase only).

narrative_allowlist.description: Hand-written narrative/interactive-tool pages, explicitly out of scope for the generator per #268's own proposal.

debug_allowlist.description: Testing infrastructure used by this project's own Playwright specs — not user-facing documentation.
